curation_notes: Patch adds a single checkPointer() call in modifyRPath to validate the dyn pointer before iterating through the dynamic section. Location derived directly from the patch diff which modifies only src/patchelf.cc in the modifyRPath function. No sibling source files exist in src/ — patchelf.cc is the only C++ source file. Pre-assigned class buffer-overflow confirmed: CWE-125 (out-of-bounds read) matches the missing bounds check on the pointer.
